subcodes.first_line: O my Lord!  My Hope!  My Helper and my Refuge!  Verily, Thy pure beloved ones and Thy aspiring wooers
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و غیاثی و ملاذی ان احبائک الاصفیاء و اودائک النجباء اسلاء عبدک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @call to action, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
